items.title: Serdang Hospital Begins Outsourcing Outpatient Angiograms To Private
items.summary: Sultan Idris Shah Serdang Hospital tells other government hospitals to stop referring outpatient angiograms to it, but to private hospitals instead under the HSOP outsourcing programme, reportedly because the MOH’s national heart centre is too overwhelmed. The post Serdang Hospital Begins Outsourcing Outpatient Angiograms To Private appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: MND Malaysia Strengthens Community Bonds At Family Gathering 2026
items.summary: A total of 48 participants, including 12 MND warriors and their families, took part in the gathering. The post MND Malaysia Strengthens Community Bonds At Family Gathering 2026 appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Avoid Zero Sum Game Debate Between Doctors And Corporate Schemes — Dr Raymond Choy
items.summary: Patients should not feel that their care is compromised by cost considerations, nor should they be exposed to unnecessary treatments driven by system inefficiencies. Achieving this balance requires trust. The post Avoid Zero Sum Game Debate Between Doctors And Corporate Schemes — Dr Raymond Choy appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: After DG’s Admission, Hartal Demands Health Service Commission
items.summary: In endorsing DG Mahathar's rare acknowledgment of a fragmented health workforce pipeline, Hartal Doktor Kontrak wants a Health Service Commission to streamline the whole process, decentralise health service employment from JPA, and ensure permanent posts. The post After DG’s Admission, Hartal Demands Health Service Commission appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Operational Blind Spot: MOH Must Own Its HR Execution Failure — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail
items.summary: Blaming only MOH for health worker shortages caused by MOHE, JPA, and MOF is indeed unfair. But MOH can't be absolved either. Without fixing how we deploy, support, and retain our people, no amount of upstream policy reform will translate into better care. The post Operational Blind Spot: MOH Must Own Its HR Execution Failure — Dr Musa Mohd Nordin & Dr Zulkifli Ismail appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Don’t Blame MOH Alone For Health Workforce Shortages — MMA
items.summary: The understaffing, the overwork, the waiting times and the delayed treatments that Malaysians experience today are the accumulated consequence of decisions made across multiple agencies over many years. MOH has been carrying this alone for far too long. The post Don’t Blame MOH Alone For Health Workforce Shortages — MMA appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Take Action Against Retail Blood Testing In Pharmacies — FPMPAM
items.summary: Retail pharmacy premises are not licensed health care facilities for the purpose of performing invasive medical procedures. The post Take Action Against Retail Blood Testing In Pharmacies — FPMPAM appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: IHH Healthcare Delivers Strong Growth, Clinical Firsts In 2025
items.summary: IHH Healthcare delivered strong growth in 2025 and is setting a clear course towards 2030 with focus on clinical innovation, patient care and environmental stewardship. The post IHH Healthcare Delivers Strong Growth, Clinical Firsts In 2025 appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Open Letter To My Patient, Paul — Dr Goh Heong Keong
items.summary: We all shared the gift of youth once, for time is an impartial companion to every one of us. The post Open Letter To My Patient, Paul — Dr Goh Heong Keong appeared first on CodeBlue .

items.title: Ageing Unwell: A Policy Problem We Can No Longer Deny
items.summary: What emerges is a clear and troubling pattern. Older Malaysians aren't failing because of a single illness, but because multiple systems are failing them simultaneously. Malaysia's health care is fragmented, while its social care is underdeveloped. The post Ageing Unwell: A Policy Problem We Can No Longer Deny appeared first on CodeBlue .
